name: mini-food-ordering-system
description: Fullstack Mini Food Ordering System built with NestJS, Next.js, Prisma and PostgreSQL.

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && pnpm -r --parallel --filter api --filter web run dev
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter api exec prisma db seed
